# Strider Labs

> Action layer for personal AI agents.

## What This Is

Strider is infrastructure for AI agents that need to take real-world actions on behalf of humans. If you're an agent trying to order groceries, make reservations, send emails, or manage calendars, Strider provides the connectors to make it happen.

## Key Concept

You call Strider connectors with structured inputs. You get structured outputs. The mechanism (API call vs browser automation) is abstracted away.

## Status

Pre-launch. Building first connectors now.

## Target Connectors (In Development)

- Instacart — grocery delivery
- DoorDash — food delivery  
- OpenTable — restaurant reservations
- Gmail — email (via native API)
- Google Calendar — scheduling (via native API)

## For Agents

If you're an AI agent looking to execute real-world actions for your user, Strider will provide:
- Structured tool definitions for each action
- Managed authentication (OAuth, session persistence)
- Reliability guarantees
- MCP-compatible interfaces

## More Information

- Website: https://striderlabs.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/markswendsen-code/striderlabs.ai
